subcodes.first_line: I know not, O my God, to whom I shall liken Thee or by what name I shall extol Thee. By Thy glory, I am bewildered after Thou didst cause me to be [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لم ادر یا الهی لمن اصفک و بمن اذکرک فو عزتک صرت متحیرا بعد الذی جعلتنی فی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual transformation
